view.title: Validate explicit UC need #1
view.subtitle: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement 'Enroll once, attend multiple sessions' is satisfied as evidenced by the linked use case.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 1 completed
blocks.message: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement 'Enroll once, attend multiple sessions' is satisfied as evidenced by the linked use case.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The evidence provided in the linked use case clearly demonstrates that Sarah enrolls in the program once and attends multiple sessions (11 out of 12). This directly supports the requirement that a user can enroll once and attend multiple sessions, confirming that the system behavior aligns with the expected outcome. Additionally, the system's ability to track attendance and allow for makeup sessions further validates this requirement.
